info.name: Car Hero - Public Website API
info.description: Public website endpoints for browsing services, providers, and provider applications.

exec: pm.request.headers.upsert({ key: 'Accept', value: 'application/json' });

request.description:
List of providers

Module: providers
Controller: ProvidersController.findAll
Auth: Public
Related collections: providers
Source: src/modules/providers/presentation/controllers/providers.controller.ts:68

exec: pm.test('Response status is not server error', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.below(500); });
pm.test('Response time is acceptable', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

request.description:
Login with phone number and password

Module: auth
Controller: AuthController.login
Auth: Public
Related collections: users, pending_registrations, logouts
Source: src/modules/auth/presentation/controllers/auth.controller.ts:99

exec: pm.test('Response status is not server error', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.below(500); });
pm.test('Response time is acceptable', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
const json = (() => { try { return pm.response.json(); } catch (e) { return {}; } })();
const accessToken = json.accessToken || json.access_token || json.token || json?.data?.accessToken || json?.data?.access_token || json?.tokens?.accessToken || json?.data?.tokens?.accessToken;
const refreshToken = json.refreshToken || json.refresh_token || json?.data?.refreshToken || json?.data?.refresh_token || json?.tokens?.refreshToken || json?.data?.tokens?.refreshToken;
const userId = json.user?._id || json.user?.id || json?.data?.user?._id || json?.data?.user?.id || json.admin?._id || json.admin?.id || json?.data?.admin?._id || json?.data?.admin?.id;
if (accessToken) pm.environment.set('access_token', accessToken);
if (refreshToken) pm.environment.set('refresh_token', refreshToken);
if (userId) pm.environment.set('user_id', userId);
